sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">Riv. Fil.</title_> iii (1875). [Col. or <title_ TEIform="title">Fr.</title_>] <title_ TEIform="title">Ir. = de Ira,</title_> ed. C. Wilke, Leipzig (T.) 1914. <title_ TEIform="title">Lib.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ παρρησίας,</foreign> ed. A. Olivieri, Leipzig (T.) 1914. <title_ TEIform="title">Mort. = de Morte,</title_> ed. D. Bassi, <title_ TEIform="title">Papiri Ercolanesi,</title_> Milan 1914. [Col.] <title_ TEIform="title">Mus. = de Musica,</title_> ed. J. Kemke, Leipzig (T.) 1884. <title_ TEIform="title">Oec.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ οἰκονομίας,</foreign> ed. C. Jensen, Leipzig (T) 1906. <title_ TEIform="title">Piet. = de Pietate,</title_> ed. T. Gomperz, <title_ TEIform="title">Herkulanische Studien</title_> ii, Leipzig 1866. [Col. or <title_ TEIform="title">Fr.</title_>] <title_ TEIform="title">Po.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ ποιημάτων,</foreign> ed. A. Hausrath, <title_ TEIform="title">Jahrbücher für klassische Philologie, Suppl.</title_> xvii (1889) p. 211; ed. T. Gomperz, <title_ TEIform="title">Philodem und die aesthetischen Schriften der Herkulanensischen Bibliothek, Sitzungsberichte der Wiener Akademie,</title_> cxxiii (1891); ed. C Jensen, <title_ TEIform="title">Philodemos über die Gedichte, fünftes Buch,</title_> Berlin 1923. [No. of book (where known, otherwise No. of papyrus), Col. or <title_ TEIform="title">Fr.</title_>] <title_ TEIform="title">Rh. = Volumina Rhetorica,</title_> ed. S. Sudhaus, 2 vols., Leipzig (T.) 1892, 1896, <title_ TEIform="title">Suppl.</title_> 1895. [Cited by vol. and p.] <title_ TEIform="title">Sign.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ σημείων καὶ σημειώσεων,</foreign> ed. T. Gomperz, <title_ TEIform="title">Herkulanische Studien</title_> i, Leipzig 1865. [Col. or <title_ TEIform="title">Fr.</title_>] <title_ TEIform="title">Sto.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ τῶν Στωικῶν,</foreign> ed. W. Crönert, <title_ TEIform="title">Kolotes und Menedemos,</title_> Leipzig 1906, pp. 53 sqq. [Col. or <title_ TEIform="title">Fr.</title_>] <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ κακιῶν ί,</foreign> ed. C. Jensen, Leipzig (T.) 1911.</item>
